{{Quote|This alien seems to have an aversion to violence and has never been known to engage in battle; however, Kn'ik is quite crafty and has eluded several bounty hunters through deception.|A bounty posting on Kn'ik Th'ronik|<ref name="ND" />}}
The '''Fnessian''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fnessal]]. They had two [[Ommatophora|eyestalks]] on their head, from the back of which grew thick, fleshy tendrils. Fnessian biology included a [[Gender/Legends|gender]] known as "thos." [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]] was a Fnessian [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] during the period of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and stole the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Morgannier]]'' while on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], causing the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] to place a large [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Fnessian's head.

==Biology and appearance==
The Fnessian were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]],<ref name="CSWE" /> with two upper [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] that ended in hands with at least four fingers. Their heads had two flexible [[Eye/Legends|eyestalks]], one extending upward from each side.<ref name="ND" /> A number of thick fleshy tendrils covered the back of their heads,<ref name="CSWE" /> growing downward. Fnessians also had a row of other corrugations on their faces.<ref name="ND" />

The Fnessian had a [[Gender/Legends|gender]] known as "thos." The Fnessian [[Kn'ik Th'ronik]] was a thos and lived to at least thirty-five [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] of age.<ref name="ND" />

==Society and culture==
The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] Th'ronik was rumored to have an aversion to violence and had never engaged in battle; the Fnessian instead escaped several [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] using deception and was reputed to be a crafty individual.<ref name="ND" />

==History==
The Fnessian were native to the<ref name="ND" /> [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Fnessal system/Legends|Fnessal system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fnessal]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Fnessian Kn'ik Th'ronik smuggled [[Blaster/Legends|weapons]] and [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and was suspected of having ties with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. While on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], Th'ronik stole the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Morgannier]]'', earning the ire of the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. They placed a 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Th'ronik for either his capture or proof of his [[Death/Legends|death]]; in the event of the latter, SoroSuub could verify his identity with a genetic sample kept on their file. SoroSuub also offered a bonus of gems worth 10,000 credits if the ''Morgannier'' was returned in good condition. Associates of the Fnessian included the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Timma Briss]] and the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Bolabo Hujaan]], although Th'ronik frequently worked alone.<ref name="ND" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fnessians were created for the [[West End Games]] sourcebook [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']], published in [[1997]].<ref name="ND" />
